---
name: Proposal (becomes an ADR)
about: Propose an architectural / tooling change
title: '[proposal] '
labels: proposal
---

## Summary

One-paragraph what + why.

## Context

What forces / constraints / consumer is asking for this.

## Options considered

1. ...
2. ...
3. (do nothing)

## Recommendation

Which option and why.

## Layer impact

- new artifact at layer: ACTIVE_NOW | OPTIONAL_LATER | SCALE_STAGE | EXPERIMENTAL
- promotes / demotes anything? ...

## ADR

If accepted, the ADR will live at `standards/adr/NNNN-<slug>.md`.
